1. [Pre-Close] Going through product details, features, benefits, USPs, addressing initial objections. 



2. Testimonials Related Specifically to the Product (If Applicable). 



3. [Close Set Up] Now given everything you’ve discovered today, I’m sure you’re wondering how you can get your hands on PRODUCT as fast as possible, along with how often you should use product for best results. NOTE: so you’re asking two questions for them and then being a helpful nice person and saying you’ll answer those questions for them. 



4. [Scarcity] I wish it were easier for you to get PRODUCT but it’s actually hard.



Scarcity Reasons: 

For Nutra: 

- Ingredients are rare and/or expensive

- Production/manufacturing is time consuming and/or expensive

- High Demand, limited quality, means out of stocks are always a risk. 



For Information Products: 

- Powers That Be Don’t Want Me Sharing This. 

- I’m willing to share this information with some people, but if too many people know about it, it could ruin the magic

- Physical: I only have limited copies of physical product and demand is high.

- Training: Limited Spots, Limited Bandwidth, Technological Limitations, Physical Limitations (The Room Only Holds X People)



5. But with that being said, I’m going to show you how you can get your hands on PRODUCT today, for a limited time only. 



6. First though, how do you get best results with product? 



Nutra: 

- Take it every single day. Even if you start seeing results, keep taking it. 

- Remind them of studies that lasted for multiple months. Point is that while short-term results can happen fast, results only get better over time. 

- This is why so many health experts recommend you use product for at least 3 months, 6 months for even better results. 



Informational: 

- Primarily just preaching compliance (following directions). Use the information, follow the steps (and it’s easy to do that), and you’ll see results. 



7. More Scarcity and Exclusivity: Offer is only available on this website, right now, while supplies last.



8. [Price Justification Begins – Setting a Higher Price + Dismissing Alternatives]. Normal or Suggested Retail is “X.” And that’s a very fair price because alternatives are pricier, harder to use, not high quality, not legit etc. Plus, that’s not including the things money can’t buy. 



9. [Mission of Avatar] But while price is normally “X,” I’m going to do something special today (for a limited time only). That’s because this isn’t about money for me. It’s about a higher calling. 



10. [Price Reveal] Which is why right now you can order product for not “X” but instead “Y” which is a big savings. 



10.5. [Optional: For Nutra Or Where You Sell Multiple Packages Of a Physical Product]. And that’s still just the start. You see because so many people order this product not just for themselves, but for their family and friends too. When you stock up today, you can save even more. This is important because as I’ve mentioned out of stocks happen all of the time. You don’t want to start using product and then find out that you can’t get more. That’s why so many smart people stock up. 



11. Even cheaper prices revealed for when they stock up.  



12. Call To Action #1  



13. What happens after they click the button. 



13.5 [Optional: Bonuses]. In addition to PRODUCT, when you make your investment today you’ll also receive the following bonuses: XYZ. 



14. Call to Action #2



15. [Guarantee]. Your investment today also comes with an XXX Day Guarantee. It works like this: Even though most people love the product and you’ll probably love it too, if you don’t for any reason, just call or email our award winning customer service team, and you’ll get a full refund with zero questions asked. 



16. Call to Action #3



17. [Final Push/CTA #4]. So you’ve got nothing to risk and everything to gain. Imagine a life where you have this product and everything is amazing. It could be yours, but you really do need to take action by clicking the add to cart button right now, while there is still time. We’re reaching the end of the presentation.  



18. [Crossroads Close]. Right now you’re at a crossroads. You can choose not to take action and life will continue on the way it’s been. But if you do that, what’s going to change? If you’re here now, if you’ve made it this far in the video, it’s because you know something has got to give. You’re suffering and you’re tired of suffering. I don’t want you to think back to this presentation months into the future, and regret not taking action. Especially because this offer won’t be available then. God Forbid, I don’t want something disastrous to happen, and it could have been avoided if you’d simply taken action today. So that brings us to the second option. The option where you buy product risk-free, experience its benefits, and change your life. This is what your life would look like if you did that. Appeal to their logical side and their emotional side about why it makes so much sense. Ultimately, the choice is there, but it should be clear what the best option is.



19. Call to Action #5 



20. Thanks for watching and sign off. 



Followed by FAQs.
